speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: Jalen Brunson and the New York Knicks will win the NBA Finals.
argument: Series position: Brunson had just taken a 3-1 lead, which Draymond said put the Knicks on their way to a championship; Brunson reassessment: Draymond said he had been too critical of Brunson and now expected him to become a champion.
grade_note: NYK beat SAS 4-1, so Brunson and the Knicks won the NBA Finals.
grade_note_general: NYK beat SAS 4-1, so Brunson and the Knicks won the NBA Finals.

speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: The New York Knicks will beat the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.
argument: Spurs mentality: Draymond said San Antonio would have a hard time getting itself back up after blowing a 29-point lead in Game 4; Collapse aftermath: He said it would be tough for the Spurs to get off the canvas after a collapse that severe.
grade_note: NYK beat SAS 94-90 in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.
